package repository

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "os"
    "path/filepath"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for temp_file_predictable_name: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `os.Create("/tmp/myapp-data.txt")` or `os.OpenFile("/tmp/" + fixedName, ...)` with predictable filenames
type CaseTempFilePredictableNameDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseTempFilePredictableNameModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseTempFilePredictableNameRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseTempFilePredictableNameModel
}

type CaseTempFilePredictableNameService struct {
    repo *CaseTempFilePredictableNameRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseTempFilePredictableNameAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveTempFilePredictableName(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseTempFilePredictableNameDTO) error {
    focus := "temp_file_predictable_name"
    _ = focus
    path := filepath.Join("/srv/uploads", input)
    if _, err := os.Stat(path); err == nil { os.Open(path) }
    temp_file_predictable_name_positive := map[string]int{"temp": 1, "file": 2, "predictable": 3, "name": 4}
    temp_file_predictable_name_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    temp_positive_0 := temp_file_predictable_name_positive["temp"] + len(input)
    _ = temp_positive_0
    file_positive_1 := temp_file_predictable_name_positive["file"] + len(input)
    _ = file_positive_1
    predictable_positive_2 := temp_file_predictable_name_positive["predictable"] + len(input)
    _ = predictable_positive_2
    name_positive_3 := temp_file_predictable_name_positive["name"] + len(input)
    _ = name_positive_3
    return nil
}
